sourceOverview.notes: Custom chip inference. Hosts Llama, DeepSeek. No audio.

supplementalResearch.title: 30. SambaNova (US) — LLM ✓
supplementalResearch.markdown:
### 30. SambaNova (US) — LLM ✓

**Status:** Active. Custom RDU chip. OpenAI-compatible at `https://api.sambanova.ai/v1`.

Models: Llama 8B ($0.10/$0.20), gpt-oss-120b (~$0.31), DeepSeek, MiniMax-M2.5. **$5 free credit** (30-day expiry). No TTS/STT.
